partner-id and sender-id were both 128, as on every prior attempt.

The immediately preceding attempts on this same deployed client contract returned HTTP 400 GENS-0003 Invalid partnerID. T-Mobile Engineering recreated the gateway configuration shortly before this request.
Root cause inside T-Mobile is not independently observable from the client; this record asserts only what the client observed.
X-Auth-Originator presence is not reproduced here — it is emitted only when the OAuth response returned an id_token. Consult the operator's raw bundle.
Exactly one activation was sent. The runner never retries.

partner_foundation.note: No Partner Foundation header was configured or transmitted on the successful request. The activation succeeded without it.
